# Code of Conduct

## Our Standard

This project expects discussion to stay technically serious, respectful, and useful.

Examples of acceptable behavior:

- criticizing code, designs, and claims without attacking people
- providing concrete reproductions and evidence
- disagreeing directly and professionally
- keeping discussion focused on the software and its users

Examples of unacceptable behavior:

- harassment, insults, or threats
- bad-faith pile-ons
- deliberately misleading bug reports or benchmarks
- publishing private security details before coordinated disclosure

## Enforcement

Project maintainers may remove comments, close threads, or block participation when behavior degrades the signal quality of the project.

## Reporting

For conduct issues related to security-sensitive situations, use the private reporting path in [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md).
